title: chrysanthemum depressum
intro: Chrysanthemum depressum, also known as the yellow-flowered chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, relieve headache, and soothe skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Chrysanthemum depressum is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and it can also be taken as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
